claim: Cross-check confirms: YOLO demand evidence system implements four-scope evidence separation with router validation, boundary enforcement, and three-role agent protocols. All 22 explorer evidence records independently verified with correct line numbers, function names, and implementation details.

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES set declared with four scopes: project, external, user, unknown.
evidence.why: Primary evidence scope contract definition confirmed.

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_AGENT_PROTOCOLS defines explorer, cross_checker, and verifier with objectives, prompts, writes_code: false, and result_schema.
evidence.why: Three-role protocol definition independently verified.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope classifies by scope field with fallback logic: handles project/repo/codebase/local, external/web/internet/research, user/human/operator, unknown/unverified, then by url/path/source patterns.
evidence.why: Evidence scope classification implementation confirmed.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordHasDeclaredScope checks VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES.has(clean(record.scope)).
evidence.why: Scope validation function confirmed.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues generates PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE when evidence lacks project scope, and PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED when project scope lacks path locator.
evidence.why: Project evidence enforcement logic confirmed.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness iterates requiredEvidenceRoles, calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues, evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues, and projectEvidenceBlockingIssues for each result.
evidence.why: PRD readiness validation calls evidence scope checks confirmed.

evidence.summary: inspectEvidenceAgreement groups results by claim, generates EVIDENCE_AGENT_CONFLICT blocker when recommendations include block or mixed proceed/clarify/cross_check.
evidence.why: Evidence conflict detection prevents averaging disagreements confirmed.

evidence.summary: buildDemandEvidenceAgentPrompt includes explicit scope rules: 'Every evidence record must include scope: project, external, user, or unknown' and 'Project facts require project-scoped evidence...with a repo-relative path or file locator.'
evidence.why: Agent prompt contract includes scope requirements confirmed.

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot captures project file state using gitFiles or walkFiles, excludes allowedRoots, stores file digests in Map.
evidence.why: Boundary snapshot creation mechanism confirmed.

evidence.summary: diffBoundarySnapshots compares before/after Maps to detect deleted, modified, and added files; returns sorted changes list.
evidence.why: Boundary violation detection logic confirmed.

evidence.summary: After agent execution, builds boundaryAfter snapshot, compares with boundaryBefore, sets project_mutation to violated or clean, records changes.
evidence.why: Post-execution boundary audit confirmed.

evidence.summary: Boundary violations generate BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers with path and change, and merge into readiness.blockers.
evidence.why: Boundary violations block PRD readiness confirmed.

evidence.summary: Test 'external-only evidence cannot satisfy existing project facts' validates PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE blocker.
evidence.why: Test coverage for external vs project evidence separation confirmed.

evidence.summary: Test 'project evidence requires a concrete project locator' validates PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blocker.
evidence.why: Test coverage for project locator requirements confirmed.

evidence.summary: Test 'external URLs cannot be relabeled as project evidence' validates PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blocker for URLs.
evidence.why: Test coverage for URL vs project path distinction confirmed.

evidence.summary: Test 'evidence records must declare valid scope explicitly' validates EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker.
evidence.why: Test coverage for explicit scope declaration requirement confirmed.

evidence.summary: Test 'agent evidence without explicit scope is blocked during normalization' validates EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED error code.
evidence.why: Dispatch-level scope validation test coverage confirmed.

evidence.summary: Test 'boundary blocks project file mutation even when agent results pass' validates BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blocker.
evidence.why: Boundary enforcement test coverage confirmed.

evidence.summary: Doctrine states: '证据记录必须声明 scope: project | external | user | unknown。project 证据来自目标项目的 code、tests、docs、config、logs 或 artifacts，并且必须带 repo-relative path 或 file locator；external 证据可以来自 WebFetch/WebSearch 或外部文档，但只能作为背景研究，不能单独证明目标项目已有字段、API、状态机或数据流。'
evidence.why: Product documentation for evidence scope requirements confirmed.

evidence.summary: Doctrine states: 'dispatch 会在运行前后审计项目文件边界，任何越界改动都会变成 readiness blocker。'
evidence.why: Product documentation for boundary enforcement confirmed.

evidence.summary: Doctrine defines three agent roles: explorer reads project facts, cross-checker independently verifies high-risk facts, verifier checks evidence adequacy and prevents assumptions from masquerading as facts.
evidence.why: Product documentation for three-role protocol confirmed.

risks: If evidence scope classification logic in evidenceRecordScope has edge-case bugs, external research could be misclassified as project facts.
If boundary snapshot comparison in non-git repos misses file changes outside git tracking, project mutations could go undetected.
If agent prompts do not consistently enforce scope requirements across all provider implementations, agents may return malformed evidence.

result.notes: All 22 explorer evidence records independently verified through direct file reads. Line numbers, function names, implementation details, test coverage, and documentation claims all match actual codebase. No conflicts found between explorer claims and actual implementation. Four-scope evidence separation is consistently implemented across router, dispatch, tests, and documentation.
